Verification: daily --json parse smoke returned ai-pm-tm-test and 4 active memory tasks

Title: Desktop setup gateway click-through smoke
Acceptance Criteria: New Project, Adopt Existing Project, and Demo Project can be clicked in Electron without bypassing setup
Verification: Manual Electron smoke plus desktop build

Title: Adopt command write consolidation
Acceptance Criteria: adopt --defaults can either write missing setup files directly or clearly invoke setup repair

Title: JSON stdout regression tests
Acceptance Criteria: Every --json command emits parseable JSON only on stdout
Verification: CLI completion gate tests parse stdout

Title: Hermes Discord adapter setup
Acceptance Criteria: Hermes Agent Bot can query project status through local server read-only commands
Verification: Local server chat route tests and Discord adapter dry run

Title: Notion MCP/API tracking sync
Acceptance Criteria: Issues/features can sync to Notion behind approval gate
Verification: Dry-run mutation executor plus Notion connector fixture

Title: Weekly report from project evidence
Acceptance Criteria: Weekly report uses memory, audit, issues, risks, and verification evidence

Title: Final acceptance package
Acceptance Criteria: Release checklist maps all business requirements to evidence
